items.name_en: 【Premium Quality Factory Original】💗Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag 👝👝
items.name_cn:
【Premium Quality Factory Original】💗Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag 👝👝
 The Goyard Jouvence series is a classic in Goyard's art of life and travel! Handcrafted from cowhide, paired with a yellow lining, featuring an inner and outer pocket design 👛👛 Simple, lightweight, sturdy, and durable. The clean and tidy lining and elegant appearance make it an indispensable functional product for travel 💃💃
 🔆The large toiletry bag is the perfect choice for large capacity storage 🔆The small toiletry bag is for carrying essentials, accommodating quick touch-ups, and can also be used as a small wallet and clutch, representing Goyard's practicality and urban style.
Size GM size :30x23×7.5cm
🔎 020206

items.name_en: 【Premium Quality】M11468 Blue Suit Wallet Series New Arrival MULTIPLE Wallet. This Multiple Wallet features Monogram Eclipse Reverse coated canvas with clean lines, accented by calfskin trim. It includes card slots and a bill compartment, with a compact design that fits easily into most pockets or handbags. 11.5 x 9 x 1.5 cm.

items.name_en: 【Premium Quality】M11469 Blue Porte Cartes Series New Arrival Pocket Wallet. This pocket wallet features Monogram Eclipse Reverse canvas for a compact structure and deep style, accented by calfskin trim to add a bold youthful touch. 7.5 x 11.1 x 1 cm.

items.name_en: 【Premium Quality】M11471 Blue Porte Cartes Double Wallet. A double card holder crafted from Monogram Eclipse Reverse canvas. items.name_en: 【Rosalie Wallet】 m12220 Monogram Red m12239 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa)
items.name_cn:
【Rosalie Wallet】 m12220 Monogram Red m12239 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa)
This Rosalie wallet features the classic Monogram canvas from the Candy Factory collection, placing the brand mascot inside a heart-shaped candy cane pattern, making it a compact gift for Vivienne fans. Open the Vivienne-shaped button to reveal multiple pockets for safely storing coins, bills, and cards.
Size: 8 x 2.5 x 11 cm
